caption: The video appears to be a news segment discussing political developments, specifically focusing on the Congress party and its interactions with Tejashwi Yadav. The screen displays three individuals, likely prominent political figures, with text in Hindi that translates to "Congress is being humiliated; Tejashwi's 'picture' is just talk!" and "J.P. Nadda: Nitish's return is good news." The visuals and text suggest a commentary on recent political events, possibly involving alliances or shifts in power dynamics within the political landscape. The timestamp indicates it was broadcast at 10:01 PM, emphasizing the timeliness of the news. The overall tone seems critical, highlighting tensions and strategic moves among political parties.
